seoTitle: Clayton Bay vs Clearview — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clayton Bay and Clearview. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clayton Bay vs Clearview: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clayton Bay and Clearview.
heading: Clayton Bay vs Clearview — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clayton Bay, South Australia and Clearview, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clearview has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Clayton Bay (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clayton Bay or Clearview safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clayton Bay has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Clearview scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clayton Bay scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Clearview scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clayton Bay or Clearview?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clearview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
